name: &rWeapon's Room&n
description:
In the corner west you see several axes, small, medium, large, all height,
with handle made by wood, gold, silver, etc.  In the corner north there is a
lonely glass dagger, this dagger shine when orcs are nearly, and its is used by
mansour in wars.  In corner south lances, very rust, but very large too and if
it is well care, its will be useful in case of wars.  On the floor of earth
there is nothing, only feets.  Above you can see the sky.
